head.title: Repair journal
head.subtitle: Microsoldering diagnostic sessions. Click a card to resume.

empty.title: No repair in progress
empty.body: Create a new repair so the agent can start its diagnostic.

dashboard.fix_btn_title: Mark the repair as resolved — Claude validates and records the fixes

cap.body: The agent has access to its tools depending on the data you provide.
cap.minimal_blurb: Build the memory for this device and import schematic + boardview to unlock all tools.
cap.full_blurb: Schematic + boardview + memory loaded. The agent has all of its visual and causal tools available.
cap.partial_blurb: Part of the toolbox is active. Import the missing sources to unlock the rest.
cap.minimal_partial_blurb: The agent can chat but cannot show or simulate. Import schematic + boardview to make it operational.
cap.cold_blurb: No source linked to this device. Start a repair and import schematic + boardview.

schematic.title: Schematic PDF
schematic.loss_body: no simulator, no mb_hypothesize, no electrical graph. The agent cannot reason about board causality.
schematic.meta_compiled: PDF + electrical_graph — the agent can simulate and hypothesize.
schematic.meta_missing: No PDF — the agent works blind on the hardware.

boardview.title: Boardview
boardview.loss_body: 12 visual tools unavailable (bv_highlight, bv_focus, bv_measure_distance…). The agent cannot show you a component.
boardview.meta_missing: The agent cannot point at a component or measure a distance.
boardview.diag_popover_body: This board ships manufacturer-tagged net references (expected resistance per net, voltage when present). Probe a suspect net, compare with the expected value in the inspector — a wide deviation means an open or short. Boards without these refs require eyeball diagnostic or comparison against a known-good board.

knowledge.title: Causal graph
knowledge.meta_complete: registry + graph + rules + dictionary + audit. Ready for diagnosis.
knowledge.meta_building: Pipeline running — the agent will use it as soon as it finishes.
knowledge.meta_off: Built automatically when the repair starts.

memory.title: Memory Bank
memory.meta_active: The agent can call mb_get_component, mb_get_rules_for_symptoms, mb_record_finding.
memory.meta_building: Vocabulary in place, Clinician is drafting the rules…
memory.meta_off: Will be populated by the pipeline. Always active once the rules exist.

electrical.meta_compiled: Nets, rails and boot sequence ready. mb_schematic_graph + simulator OK.
electrical.meta_compiling: Schematic is imported — compilation runs in the background.
electrical.meta_off: Importing a schematic PDF unlocks this graph and the simulator.

convs.title: Diagnostic threads
convs.empty: No conversation — start a discussion with the agent.
convs.delete_confirm:
Delete this conversation?
Message history and the linked agent session will be erased. This cannot be undone.

findings.title: Saved findings
findings.empty_html: No finding for this device. The agent records them via mb_record_finding when you confirm a fault.

pack.title: Device memory
pack.empty: No pack — the device memory is not built yet.

toast.compile_done_sub: Electrical graph available — version is cached.

version.delete_confirm:
Delete the version « {name} » ?
The file will be removed from disk. If it's the active version, the next newest one becomes active.

modal.title: New repair
modal.device_placeholder: e.g. iPhone X · MNT Reform · Steam Deck
modal.hint_default: Type the device name (brand + model). The board form factor (logic board, motherboard…) is detected automatically.
modal.hint_existing_complete: Pack already built — the session opens directly. Tick to regenerate.
modal.hint_existing_partial: Pack exists but incomplete — the pipeline will fill in the missing artefacts.
modal.hint_typed: Type the device name (brand + model). The board type is detected automatically.
modal.rebuild_label: Regenerate from scratch (token cost — use if the pack is stale)
modal.symptom_placeholder: e.g. No mic audio after a fall. Speaker works, Siri replies but doesn't hear anything.
modal.symptom_hint: Describe what the client observes. The agent will start its diagnostic from there.

combo.empty: No known device — type a name to create one.

errors.device_too_short: The device name must be at least 2 characters.
errors.network: Unable to reach the server. Check that the backend is running.
